title: VarnanAI - Image Captioning System
description: An AI-powered image captioning system using CNN encoder and LSTM decoder trained on the Flickr8k dataset. Generates human-like descriptions for images with a BLEU-2 score of 0.23.

title: Lec2Notes - RAG-Based Lecture Summarizer
description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that converts lecture transcripts into structured notes with interactive Q&A. Supports multiple file formats and uses vector search for contextual responses.

title: Hindi to English Transformer
description: A transformer-based machine translation model built from scratch to translate Hindi sentences into English using attention mechanisms and sequence-to-sequence architecture.

title: Gym & Nutrition AI Chatbot
description: A fine-tuned LLM chatbot designed to provide personalized fitness and nutrition advice based on user goals, leveraging domain-specific datasets and conversational AI techniques.

title: MiniGPT - LLM Built from Scratch
description: A minimal implementation of a GPT-style language model built from scratch, covering tokenization, self-attention, and training on custom text data to understand LLM internals.

title: AI Document Q&A System
description: An intelligent document-based question-answering system using embeddings and vector search, enabling users to upload PDFs and get context-aware answers.
